case_title: LUIS FERNANDO FILGUEIRA CANDIDO VS. CARLOS ALBERTO CASAMASSA JR. ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-10-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF LUIS FERNANDO FILGUEIRA CANDIDO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CARLOS ALBERTO CASAMASSA JR. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HYBRID REPAIR AND RENTALS INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CARLOS ALBERTO CASAMASSA JR. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY PORTUGUESE INTERPRETER STELLA HECHT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,750.00 FILED BY FILGUEIRA CANDIDO, LUIS FERNANDO AS TO DEFENDANT CASAMASSA JR., CARLOS ALBERTO HYBRID REPAIR AND RENTALS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
